# Bengaluru Events Directory — Full Event Listing
# Tech events, hackathons, conferences, startup events & meetups
# in Bengaluru (Bangalore), India · April–May 2026
# Website: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com
# Author: Sagar Jethi (@sagarbjethi)
# Last updated: Monday, April 27, 2026 (2026-04-27)

## Summary

80 tracked tech events. 28 upcoming as of 2026-04-27.
12 hackathons · 8 conferences · 35 meetups · 13 startup events.
44+ free to attend. Combined hackathon prize pool ≈ $242K+.

Companies running events: OpenAI, Y Combinator, Amazon Web Services, Meta, Google,
ElevenLabs, Hugging Face, Databricks, PyTorch Foundation, GitHub, Microsoft,
Apache Kafka, Razorpay, Lightspeed, Lyzr.

---

### Altimate Hackday
- ID: 44
- Date: Apr 18
- Start: 2026-04-18
- Venue: Bengaluru (exact venue on registration approval)
- Time: 10:00 AM – 8:30 PM
- Cost: Free (application-based)
- Category: hackathon
- Tags: Altimate, Data Engineering, Claude API, AI Workflows, Open Source
- Status: Past
- Description: Full-day in-person hackathon for experienced data engineers (5–15 years) building real workflows with the open-source Altimate Code harness and on-site Claude API access. 8 hours of hacking, team demos, judging by industry veterans. Prizes: Mac Mini (1st), audiophile headphones (2nd), Mokobara backpack (3rd), plus swag for all.
- Register: https://luma.com/zr4z3g8f
- Detail page: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/events/altimate-hackday

### AI-Native Development: Building with AI, Cloud & Blockchain
- ID: 45
- Date: Apr 23
- Start: 2026-04-23
- Venue: Polaris School of Technology, DivyaSree Technopark, EPIP Zone, Brookefield
- Time: 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM
- Cost: Free (approval required)
- Category: meetup
- Tags: AI, Chainlink, Blockchain, MLOps, AI Agents, Web3, Observability
- Status: Past
- Description: Developer meetup on AI-native architectures, agentic workflows, MLOps, and observability across Web2 and Web3. Speakers: Subham Londhe (300K+ YouTube, AI/MLOps), Sagar Jethi (Chainlink Community Advocate, CRE & real-world use cases), Neel Shah (DevRel StackGen, observability), Harsh Shah (DevRel Transak, Web3 infra), Neeraj Penumaka (Backend Lead Nasiko, Data Science). Hosted by Tanisha Singhal. Powered by Chainlink Global Events.
- Register: https://luma.com/cl_ai_blrmeetup
- Detail page: https://bengaluru-events.sagarjethi.com/events/ai-native-development-building-with-ai-cloud-blockchain
